page_content:
Formerly: PSYC729.

PSYC685 Counseling Psychology Didactic Practicum in Counseling Supervision (3 Credits)

In depth examinatin of theories and techniques of counseling supervision, supervised experience in the process of supervising counselors.

Cross-listed with: EDCP685.

Restriction: Must be in the Counseling Psychology program. Formerly: EDCP745.
